areas.label: The Economy
areas.synthesis: Remittances hit a 2026-high in May and April activity rebounded 2.3%, the strongest reading in five years — early signs the economy is climbing out of Q1's contraction.

headlines.title: April economic activity (IGAE) rebounds +2.3% — strongest in ~5 years
Nu llega a la banca en plena transformación digital del país

areas.label: Money & fintech
areas.synthesis: Moody's cut Mexico to its last investment-grade rung over Pemex and deficits, even as global asset managers keep expanding their footprint in the Mexican market.

headlines.title: Moody's cuts Mexico to Baa3, the last investment-grade rung
BlackRock, Vanguard y el banco central de Noruega: así crece el peso del capital global en la BMV
SCJN: Lenia Batres y Arístides Guerrero suman 184 asesores con sueldos de hasta 124,000 pesos

areas.label: Politics & elections
areas.synthesis: A second judicial reform pushes judicial elections to 2028 and restructures the Supreme Court, while Sheinbaum's cabinet exits begin the realignment toward the 2027 elections.

headlines.title: Second judicial reform published in the DOF: judicial elections pushed to 2028, Supreme Court restructured
Sheinbaum confirms ~7 cabinet exits ahead of the 2027 elections

areas.label: Security
areas.synthesis: The government reports homicides at multi-year lows, down about 46% since taking office, including the lowest single day in a decade.

headlines.title: Government reports homicides at multi-year lows — down ~46% since it took office

areas.label: US–Mexico
areas.synthesis: The U.S. declined to renew USMCA, moving to annual reviews through 2036, kept a 10% surcharge on non-USMCA goods in place, and Mexico is now pursuing criminal complaints over deaths in U.S. immigration enforcement.

headlines.title: U.S. declines to renew USMCA, opening a 10-year annual-review cycle
Mexico to file U.S. criminal complaints over citizens' deaths in immigration enforcement
Court keeps the 10% Section 122 surcharge on non-USMCA Mexican goods in force — expires July 24
